# Voyage-Ed Travels

> Voyage-Ed Travels is a premium travel agency and travel-industry training institute based in Mohali, Chandigarh region, Punjab, India. It offers international and domestic holiday packages, Canada flight booking for NRIs and students, and professional travel-industry education including Amadeus GDS certification.

Voyage-Ed Travels serves travellers across North India (Punjab, Chandigarh, Haryana, Himachal) and the NRI community. Two core verticals: (1) curated travel packages to visa-free and trending destinations, and (2) job-oriented travel & tourism training for students and institutions. Co-founders: Vishal Sharma and Sahitya Singh. Contact: +91-7009659048, enquiry@voyage-ed.com.

## Key facts
- Business type: Travel agency + travel-industry training institute
- Location: Block-F, GMADA Aerocity, Mohali, Punjab, India (serves Chandigarh, Amritsar, Ludhiana, Jalandhar)
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91-7009659048
- Email: enquiry@voyage-ed.com
- Specialities: Visa-free destination packages, Canada flights for students/NRIs, Amadeus GDS training
- Audience: Young Indian travellers, couples, group travellers, NRIs, tourism students

## Popular travel packages
- [Georgia Tour Package from India](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/georgia-tour-package-from-india-2026): Visa-free Georgia trips from ₹45,000. Tbilisi, Kazbegi, Batumi.
- [Azerbaijan Tour Package from India](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/azerbaijan-tour-package-from-india): Baku and beyond, an emerging low-cost destination for Indians.
- [Kazakhstan Tour Package from India](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/kazakhstan-tour-package-from-india-2026): Almaty and Astana from ₹55,000. New 2026 destination with easy e-visa.
- [Vietnam Itinerary from India](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/vietnam-itinerary-from-india-7-days-2026): 7-day Hanoi, Ha Long Bay, Hoi An plan from ₹60,000.
- [Thailand Tour from Chandigarh](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/thailand-tour-from-chandigarh): Visa-free Thailand packages for couples and groups.
- [Bali Tour from Chandigarh](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/bali-tour-from-chandigarh): Romantic and honeymoon Bali packages.
- [Dubai Trip Cost from India](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/dubai-trip-cost-from-india-budget-2026): Full budget breakdown for a Dubai trip, from ₹49,500.
- [Maldives Tour from Chandigarh](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/maldives-tour-from-chandigarh): Luxury honeymoon packages.
- [Kashmir Tour Package from Punjab](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/kashmir-tour-package-from-punjab-chandigarh-2026): Domestic Kashmir tours.

## Canada flights (NRI & student focus)
- [Amritsar to Toronto Flights Price Guide](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/amritsar-to-toronto-flights-2026-price-guide): Fares, routes, and booking tips for Punjab–Canada travel.
- [Cheapest Time to Fly Delhi to Toronto](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/cheapest-time-fly-delhi-toronto-2026-2027): Seasonal fare guide.
- [Indian Students Saving on Canada Flights](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/indian-students-saving-canada-flights-2026): Student-fare and baggage tips.

## Travel education & careers
- [Amadeus GDS Training Career Guide](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/amadeus-gds-training-career-guide-india-2026): GDS certification cost, jobs, salary, and career path.
- [GDS Training Chandigarh](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/gds-training-chandigarh): Live Amadeus system training in Chandigarh.
- [Travel & Tourism Courses After 12th](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/travel-tourism-courses-after-12th-chandigarh-2026): Course options, salaries, and how to become job-ready.

## Travel guides & visa help
- [Visa-Free Countries for Indians 2026](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/visa-free-countries-india-2026): Up-to-date list of visa-free and visa-on-arrival destinations.
- [Georgia Visa for Indians](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/georgia-visa-for-indians): Visa-free entry rules for Georgia.
- [Schengen Visa India Guide](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/schengen-visa-india-guide-2026): Step-by-step Schengen application help.
- [Best Honeymoon Destinations 2026](https://voyage-ed.com/blog/best-honeymoon-destinations-india-2026): Honeymoon ideas with budgets.
